title: Proceedings of GT2006
abstract:
Increasingly, more stringent emissions regulations have ne-
cessitated new gas turbine combustor designs with low pollutant
emissions. Radically different modern designs have been devel-
oped to meet these requirements while maintaining high com-
bustion efﬁciencies and good ﬂame stability. While several pub-
lished methodologies for conventional combustor design exist,
none exist for modern ones.
This paper describes the development of a new preliminary
design algorithm for a modern lean premix
